history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed mobile app screen with a loading spinner and a comment/reply interface filled with Indonesian text.

The main visual focus is a smartphone-style user interface, with a circular loading indicator centered near the top over a black background. Below it, there are pill-shaped buttons and multiple comment entries, including reply counts and user tags.

The setting is an indoor, screen-based view with no physical environment visible; the background is predominantly black and dark gray. Lighting is from the screen itself, creating flat, high-contrast illumination. The camera view appears to be straight-on, as if captured directly from the phone display.

Across the top status area, there is readable text and icons: “18.35” on the left and various signal/battery/network icons on the right. In the comment area, there are large buttons reading “Top Comment” and “Terbaru,” and another button on the right labeled “Atur” with a sliders icon. There is a text input field with placeholder text “Tambahkan komentar...”. A green banner in the lower part reads “3 Hari Premium” and “Tersisa 1 dari 25,” with a button-like label on the right that says “Diklaim.” There is also the text “13 Replies.” Additional comment entries show usernames and timestamps such as “2 menit lalu” and “9 menit lalu,” along with labels that include “PSC,” “Lvl. 35.055,” “KAGE,” and “Lvl. 1.429,” plus other “Lvl. 1.495” and “Nah ini” and “Reply.” The bottom portion shows another entry that includes “Noir” and “#3931850” and “10 menit lalu.”

No important visible text detected beyond the UI text described above.

Practical Summary: This is a screenshot of a dark mobile interface showing a loading spinner and a comment section. It includes sorting controls, a comment input area, a premium claim banner, and multiple user reply lines with levels and reply counts.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
